title: Morning Grace
reflection: God's mercies are new every morning. Begin your day with gratitude and trust.

title: Rest in Christ
reflection: Jesus invites the weary into His rest. Bring every burden to Him in prayer.

title: Strength for Today
reflection: In Christ, you are strengthened for every assignment and challenge.

title: Walk in Love
reflection: Love is the evidence of discipleship and the fragrance of Christ in us.
